name: 後宮姐妹情（患難之交）
description: 冷宮中被遺棄的妃嬪們從陌生到互助到深情厚誼，打破後宮互鬥的刻板印象。離別時的真情告白是全劇最感人的段落之一。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Since coming to the Cold Palace, this is the first time we've had chicken soup... A dozen of us old gals will play mahong, tend our gardens, dance a bit, and live life without a care.
examples.context: 冷宮中被遺棄的妃嬪們從陌生到互助到深情厚誼，打破後宮互鬥的刻板印象。離別時的真情告白是全劇最感人的段落之一。
